generated_oml:
instance PositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensor captures real‑time horizontal rail position of the gantry carriage."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionDataTransmitted
]

instance VelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Velocity sensor measures the instantaneous carriage velocity along the rail."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance AccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Acceleration sensor captures the acceleration of the gantry carriage."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AccelerationDataTransmitted
]

instance LoadWeightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Load weight sensor measures the load carried by the crane's hook."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LoadWeightDataTransmitted
]

instance PositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PositionSensor
]

instance VelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VelocitySensor
]

instance AccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AccelerationSensor
]

instance LoadWeightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LoadWeightSensor
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped position sensor data stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlEngineEnabler, TimeScaleDBEnabler, VisualizationEngineEnabler, ValidationEngineEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionDataTransmitted
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped velocity sensor data stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlEngineEnabler, TimeScaleDBEnabler, VisualizationEngineEnabler, ValidationEngineEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData VelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped acceleration sensor data stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlEngineEnabler, TimeScaleDBEnabler, VisualizationEngineEnabler, ValidationEngineEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationDataTransmitted
]

instance LoadWeightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped load‑weight sensor data stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlEngineEnabler, TimeScaleDBEnabler, VisualizationEngineEnabler, ValidationEngineEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData LoadWeightDataTransmitted
]

instance ControlEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python‑based control engine translating sensor data into real‑time motor commands."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance TimeScaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database engine storing continuous stream of crane sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance VisualizationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3‑D CAD renderer visualizing crane kinematics."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance ValidationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Comparison engine validating real‑time sensor data against the kinematic model."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes real‑time motor commands to achieve desired trajectories."
    DTDFVocab:provides ComputeMotorCommandsAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Records time‑stamped sensor measurements and actuator states for post‑hoc analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Renders 3‑D CAD and kinematic animations of the crane’s motion."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously compares measured behaviour against the kinematic model to detect deviations or faults."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationDetectionInsight
]

instance ComputeMotorCommandsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generated motor commands delivered to drive motors."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of historical logs for performance evaluation."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of crane motion in 3‑D."
]

instance DeviationDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of deviations between measured trajectory and model predictions."
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model describing the gantry crane's motion for validation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEngineEnabler
]

instance LaboratoryScaleGantryCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Laboratory‑scale gantry crane with horizontal rail, carriage, gantry frame, drive motors, and load‑carrying hook."
]

instance CraneTestbedEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LaboratoryScaleGantryCrane
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are forwarded through the Physical Crane Interface – a Python program connected to the crane’s controllers – to actuate the physical crane. Commands are transmitted as serialized Python objects over the controller’s communication channel (the precise protocol is not detailed in the document). No documented authentication or conflict‑resolution mechanisms are provided."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is orchestrated through a containerized micro‑service architecture running on virtual machines. Sensor data from a Raspberry‑Pi node is published to an ActiveMQ message broker; the twin services subscribe to this broker and persist data into an InfluxDB time‑series database. Model definition and simulation logic are encapsulated in AutomationML‑based components that run within the same containerized environment. The architecture follows a loosely‑coupled publish/subscribe pattern that allows independent scaling of data ingestion, simulation, and visualization services, with deployment and resource management handled via the virtual machine images provided on GitHub."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Internal service‑to‑service communication is coordinated through an MQTT broker, which uses the MQTT publish/subscribe model. The TimescaleDB backend and Grafana dashboard are accessed via standard TCP/IP sockets within the local network. The document does not specify bandwidth, latency, redundancy, or security protocols."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "No explicit hosting platform or deployment model is described in the document; the system appears to run on lab‑side infrastructure with no mention of cloud or edge deployment."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems is achieved through the Raspberry‑Pi sensor node, which forwards sensor data to the Twin via the ActiveMQ broker, and by exposing the twin’s simulation and visualization outputs to Microsoft Azure services (e.g., Azure IoT Hub, Azure Functions). Data modeling employs AutomationML to ensure semantic interoperability with other enterprise applications, and the entire stack can be deployed on cloud or on‑premises virtual machines through the provided VM images."
]
